body.title: Self-test — directed consolidation via Q&A after reading
body.result: Self-test consolidation via Q&A for reading pipeline. consolidate_content() function + 15 unit tests, all pass. Edge strengthening based on Gemini grading. Weaning signal: <20% miss rate. Commit 81edc572.
body.description:
D230 + G-BIO-PRED1. Directed consolidation via Q&A after reading.

Question generation: send blob text to Gemini via Igor browser profile (free).
Ask Gemini to generate as many questions as appropriate for the material — no fixed count.
Gemini also grades Igor's answers (same session, same channel).

Protocol:
1. Send chapter summaries to Gemini (browser profile): "generate comprehension questions for this material"
2. For each question: Igor attempts answer via graph traversal only (no LLM, pure node activation)
3. Send (question, igor_answer, source_text) to Gemini: "grade this answer correct/partial/miss"
4. For each miss: strengthen edges along correct traversal path (+0.02 per edge)
5. For each partial: smaller strengthening (+0.01)
6. Log: {content_id, questions, igor_answers, grades, edges_updated}
7. Update blob_index.json status to "tested"; log to watchlist if >50% miss rate

Weaning signal: when Igor can self-generate questions that produce <20% miss rate, content is internalized.

File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/self_test.py (new)
Inertia: LOW
Size: M
Depends on: T-graph-integrator, GeminiSearchChannel (for Q generation + grading)
